utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: Oh , Bob , he was nothing compared to you .

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: I had to bite my lip to keep from screaming your name .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , that makes me feel so good .

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: It was just so awkward and bumpy .

emotion_cause.span: 4_It was just so awkward and bumpy .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , maybe he had some kind of uh , new , cool style , that you are not familiar with .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: And uh maybe you have to get used to it .

utterances.speaker: Jade
utterances.text: Well there really was not much time to get used to it , you know what I mean ?
